_meta.purpose: Evaluation set for Gemma 2B translation quality (en→tw)
_meta.usage: Run ml/01_evaluate_gemma.ipynb to score your model against Khaya API on these sentences.
_meta.reviewNote: Reference Twi translations need native speaker validation before use as ground truth.

sentences.tw_ref: Me pɛ sɛ me kɔ fie.

sentences.en: The market is far from here.

sentences.tw_ref: Sika bɛn na wɔwɔ m'akaunti mu?
Hyɛ wo PIN sɛ wogye to mu.

sentences.en: Your mobile money account is active.
sentences.tw_ref: Wo mobile sika akaunti yɛ adwuma.

sentences.en: Do you want to save money?

sentences.tw_ref: Yɛ ofɛ, gye to mu sika dodow no.

sentences.en: Withdraw cash from the nearest agent.
sentences.tw_ref: Twa sika fi aboafo a ɔbɛn no hɔ.

sentences.en: How many days have you been sick?
Take this medicine twice a day.
sentences.tw_ref: Nom ɔhaw yi mprenu da biara.

sentences.en: Your child needs to be vaccinated.
sentences.tw_ref: Wɔsɛ sɛ woturo wo ba no.

sentences.en: The health worker will visit you tomorrow.
sentences.tw_ref: Onipa a ɔboa wɔn a wɔyare no bɛba wo nkyɛn ɔkyena.

sentences.en: The price of maize is high today.

sentences.tw_ref: Bere bɛn na wobɛgye nnɔbae no?

sentences.en: It has not rained in two weeks.
Use fertilizer to improve the soil.
sentences.tw_ref: Fa asase ho ɔhaw ma asase no yɛ yiye.

sentences.en: Store your harvest in a dry place.
sentences.tw_ref: Kora wo nnɔbae wɔ baabi a ɛwɔ hɔ.

sentences.en: Contact the extension officer for advice.
sentences.tw_ref: Frɛ okuafo mmoa ɔhwɛfoɔ no mmoa di.

sentences.en: The cooperative will buy your crops.
sentences.tw_ref: Okuafoɔ kuo no bɛtɔ wo nnɔbae.

sentences.en: Heavy rains are expected this week.
sentences.tw_ref: Ɔsu tenten bɛto nnawɔtwe yi mu.
Yɛ ofɛ, ka aane anaa daabi.

sentences.en: Something went wrong. Please try again.
sentences.tw_ref: Biribi anto mu. Yɛ ofɛ sɔ bio.

sentences.en: Tap the button to hear the message again.
sentences.tw_ref: Klik button no sɛ wotie asɛm no bio.
